name: Monodramon

signature_move.name: Crack Bite
signature_move.description: Fragments the data of the area it bites, which may cause them to collapse into malfunction.

description: A Small Dragon Digimon that has bat-like wings attached to its hands, but is unable to fly. Despite being a Vaccine, its personality is considerably rough—or rather, brutal, giving the impression that it is a brawl-loving Digimon. Even in the Digital World, Monodramon finds itself in the midst of most brawls, often enough that it seems even Orgemon is fed up with Monodramon’s tenacity. Also, the horn extending behind it is said to be its weak point, but how true this is is uncertain. Its Signature Move is fragmenting the data of the area it bites, causing the enemy to malfunction depending on where they were bitten ( Crack Bite ). Its Special Move " Beat Knuckle " is a simple, yet bold move in which it charges forth with earth-shattering force, and wallops with its powerful claws.
